objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: trend_supertrend
archetype: trend_supertrend
family: trend
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- supertrend(atr_period=17, multiplier=4.0)
- adx(period=16)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: supertrend.direction == 1 and adx.adx > 25
- short: supertrend.direction == -1 and adx.adx > 25
exit:
- condition: supertrend.direction changes or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.0
tp_atr_mult: 2.5
description: ATR trailing stop (1.0x) and take-profit (2.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Trend and volatility based trading strategy using ATR trailing stop and take-profit with Bollinger bands and RSI for entry/exit signals.
